creative_brief: Split-screen showing supermarket generic labels vs FarmThru products with clear farm names and locations prominently displayed.
primary_text: We're the only grocery store that names the farm on every product. Rachel's Farm carrots. Bundarra Farm pork. Collins Wild Caught salmon. Zero warehouses, zero wholesalers, zero middlemen between paddock and pick-up.
headline: Every product names the farm
description: Farm-direct groceries from named regenerative farms. Collect fresh from your nearest hub.
